abilities.name: Demise (Beacon)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, all allies gain a Shielded token.

abilities.name: Drag Behind
abilities.text: Once per turn. Before this model moves, it may remove a marker within 2" of it. After resolving the move, make a marker of the same type into base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

actions.name: Radiant Flare
actions.effects: The target gains a Distracted token.

triggers.name: Scorched Retina
triggers.text: Enemy models within (X)2" of the target gain a Distracted token.

triggers.name: Illuminated Path
triggers.text: Move an ally with LoS to the target up to 3" toward the target.

triggers.name: Draw Their Attention
triggers.text: A friendly model in this model's LoS may discard a card to declare the Interact action.

actions.name: Winds of Change
actions.effects: Look at the top two cards of your fate deck and discard any number of them. Place the remaining cards on top of your fate deck in any order.

triggers.name: Trust Their Guidance
triggers.text: When resolving, look at three additional cards from this model's fate deck.

triggers.name: Forge a New Path
triggers.text: When resolving, for each card discarded, an ally in LoS may move up to 3".
